debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
α : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mR : MeasurableSpace R
inst✝⁶ : Nonempty α
inst✝⁵ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁴ : DecidableEq α
inst✝³ : Countable α
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace R
inst✝¹ : Nonempty R
alg : Algorithm α R
ν : Kernel α R
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
n : ℕ
⊢ AEMeasurable
    (fun ω =>
      ω.2
        (pullCount (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg)
          (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω)
        (@Bandits.ArrayModel.action α R mα mR inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ alg (n + 1) ω))
    (@Bandits.ArrayModel.arrayMeasure α R mα mR ν)

failed_attempts: exact (measurable_reward alg (n + 1)).aemeasurable

have h_action : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h_pullCount : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) :=
      measurable_pullCount (measurable_action alg) h_action (n + 1)
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk (Measurable.prodMk measurable_snd h_pullCount) h_action)

refine (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ ?_)).aemeasurable.comp_aemeasurable ?_
    · exact measurable_snd.eval.eval
    · exact AEMeasurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (measurable_action alg (n + 1)).aemeasurable

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      refine Measurable.comp ?_ (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun _ ↦ h1)) h1)
      exact measurable_uncurry_pullCount (R' := fun _ ↦ ())
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk h2 h1))

exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_pullCount (measurable_action alg) (measurable_action alg (n + 1)))
        (measurable_action alg (n + 1))).aemeasurable

exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_right (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)).comp
      ((measurable_pullCount (measurable_action alg) (n + 1)).prodMk (measurable_action alg (n + 1)))

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      have : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) · (n + 1) ω) :=
        measurable_from_prod_countable_right fun a ↦ by
          simp only [pullCount]
          exact Finset.measurable_card.comp (measurable_filter (fun i ↦ by fun_prop) _)
      exact this.comp (h1.prod_mk measurable_id)
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk measurable_snd (h2.prod_mk h1)) |>.aemeasurable

refine Measurable.aemeasurable ?_
    refine measurable_from_prod_countable_left (X := ℕ → α → R) (Y := ℕ → I) (Z := R) ?_
    intro p
    simp only
    exact measurable_from_prod_countable_right fun na : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      have : Measurable (fun ω ↦ (fun i ↦ action alg i ω, action alg (n + 1) ω, n + 1)) := by
        refine Measurable.prodMk ?_ (Measurable.prodMk h1 measurable_const)
        exact measurable_pi_lambda _ (fun i ↦ measurable_action alg i)
      exact measurable_pullCount.comp this
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) h2) h1)

exact Measurable.aemeasurable <| measurable_from_prod_countable_right fun a =>
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun m => by simp only; fun_prop

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ 
      pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      apply measurable_from_prod_countable_right
      intro a
      simp only
      exact Measurable.comp (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) h1)
    exact Measurable.aemeasurable (measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p ↦ by simp only; fun_prop)

refine Measurable.aemeasurable ?_
    refine measurable_from_prod_countable_left (X := ℕ → I) ?_
    intro p
    simp only
    exact measurable_from_prod_countable_right (Y := ℕ → I) fun q => by fun_prop

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      have : (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) =
          (fun ω ↦ (Finset.range (n + 1)).filter (fun i ↦ action alg i ω = action alg (n + 1) ω)
            |>.card) := rfl
      rw [this]
      exact Finset.measurable_card_filter_countable_inter_countable
        (fun i ↦ action alg i) (action alg (n + 1)) (fun i ↦ measurable_action alg i) h1
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by fun_prop)).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk measurable_snd (h2.prod_mk h1))

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R => pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      refine Measurable.comp ?_ (h1.prodMk measurable_id)
      exact measurable_uncurry_pullCount (α := α) (n + 1)
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun p : ℕ × α => by fun_prop)).comp (h2.prodMk h1)

refine Measurable.aemeasurable ?_
    refine measurable_from_prod_countable_left (X := ℕ × α) ?_
    intro ⟨m, a⟩
    exact measurable_pi_apply m |>.eval a

refine Measurable.aemeasurable ?_
    have h1 : Measurable (fun ω : probSpace α R ↦ 
      (ω.2, pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω, action alg (n + 1) ω)) := by
      refine Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (Measurable.prodMk ?_ (by fun_prop))
      exact measurable_pullCount.comp (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) 
        (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)))
    have h2 : Measurable (fun x : (ℕ → α → R) × ℕ × α ↦ x.1 x.2.1 x.2.2) :=
      measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦ by simp only; fun_prop
    exact h2.comp h1

exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦ (by simp only; fun_prop)).comp
      (Measurable.prodMk measurable_snd
        (Measurable.prodMk ((measurable_pullCount (measurable_action alg)).comp
          (Measurable.prodMk (measurable_action alg (n + 1)) measurable_id))
          (measurable_action alg (n + 1)))).aemeasurable

refine Measurable.aemeasurable ?_
    refine measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun (p : ℕ × α) ↦ ?_
    simp only
    fun_prop

have h1 : Measurable (action alg (n + 1)) := measurable_action alg (n + 1)
    have h2 : Measurable (fun ω ↦ pullCount (action alg) (action alg (n + 1) ω) (n + 1) ω) := by
      exact measurable_pullCount.comp (h1.prodMk (measurable_const.prodMk measurable_id))
    exact (measurable_from_prod_countable_left (fun (p : ℕ × α) ↦ by fun_prop)).comp
      (h2.prodMk h1) |>.aemeasurable

exact Measurable.aemeasurable (measurable_from_prod_countable_left fun p : ℕ × α ↦
      (measurable_snd.eval.eval).comp (Measurable.prodMk (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)))
